## Hard Gates (Non-Negotiable)

| Gate | Command / Check | Applies |
|------|-----------------|---------|
| **Full solution ≥1073** | `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal` | Day-1 + every merge |
| **Full solution ≥1086** | `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal` | S33-13 closeout |
| **ReplayGolden 6/6** | `dotnet test …Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests… --filter "ReplayGoldenSuiteTests"` | Every sim/delegation merge |
| **DelegationBridge ZERO touch** | `git diff HEAD -- …/DelegationBridge.cs` → empty | All stories |
| **CatalogWriteGate extend-only** | `npx gitnexus impact CatalogWriteGate` before every edit | S33-02, S33-03, S33-05, S33-06 |
| **No full corpora in CI** | Curated fixtures only | S33-02, S33-03, S33-07 |
| **No physical TL forks** | `rg TlBranchDatabase\|BranchDatabase` → zero | S33-02, S33-08 |
| **Production Baltic hash** | World hash `17144800277401907079` unchanged unless isolated fixture | S33-04, S33-07, S33-09 |
| **Isolated fixtures** | New comms/combat fixtures ∉ `ReplayGoldenRegressionCatalog.All` | S33-04, S33-07, S33-09 |

## Automated Tests Required

### S33-02 — Dependency Graph Index (Integration) — **Sprint gate**

**Test projects:** `ProjectAegis.Data.Tests`

```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "DependencyGraph|WriteGate|Platform" -v minimal
```

**What to test (Req 06 DBI-1.5):**
- `CatalogDependencyGraphIndex` builds sorted edges: platform→mount→weapon, platform→sensor
- Cache invalidated on `CatalogWriteGate.ApproveBatch` commit
- `ICatalogReader.GetSortedDependencyEdges()` stable ordering
- Quarantined bindings excluded from graph edges

**Edge cases:** orphan mount; empty platform; duplicate edge keys; post-commit graph refresh

**Estimated test count:** ~10–14

---

### S33-03 — Kill-Chain Rule Pack (Integration + Logic) — **Sprint gate**

**Test projects:** `ProjectAegis.Data.Tests`

```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "KillChain|CatalogRules|Validation|CrossSystem" -v minimal
```

**What to test (Req 06 DBI-3.5):**
- R1 `KILL_CHAIN_ORPHAN_EDGE` — weapon on mount without magazine/loadout FK
- R2 `KILL_CHAIN_RANGE_EXCEEDS_SENSOR` — weapon range vs sensor envelope
- R3 `KILL_CHAIN_SPEED_MISMATCH` — subsonic platform + hypersonic-class weapon
- R4 `KILL_CHAIN_WEAPON_EXCEEDS_PLATFORM_REACH` — range vs combat radius + sensor chain
- Deterministic sorted findings; golden hash stable on Baltic

**Edge cases:** missing mobility data (warn-not-error); boundary envelope values; empty weapon set

**Estimated test count:** ~12–18

---

### S33-04 — Datalink Comms Share Gate (Integration + Logic) — **Sprint gate**

**Test projects:** `ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests`, `ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests`

```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "Datalink|Comms" -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "ReplayGoldenSuiteTests" -v minimal
```

**What to test (Req 15/19):**
- Nominal → existing merge behavior (S30-10 `shareLagTicks` preserved)
- Degraded → suppress new peer shares (partial picture)
- Denied → suppress all share emit
- Default `CommsState.Nominal` when comms state not passed

**Edge cases:** `shareLagTicks>0` under Degraded; organic-only doctrine unchanged; stable sort keys

**Estimated test count:** ~8–12

---

### S33-06 — Platform Editor Phase G Comms (Integration) — **Sprint gate**

**Test projects:** `ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests`, `ProjectAegis.Data.Tests`

```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "PlatformImport|PlatformCatalogViewer|PlatformComms" -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "WriteGate|Platform|Comms" -v minimal
```

**What to test (Req 21 Phase A*):**
- Viewer shows comms fittings (`LinkId`, `Role`, `SatcomCapable`)
- Staging diff surfaces comms edit deltas
- Headless propose→approve round-trip via WriteGate
- No new migrations; no sim datalink behavior in this story

**Edge cases:** missing `link_catalog` row (graceful label); FK-protected `LinkId`; reject clears staging

**Estimated test count:** ~8–12

---

### S33-07 — Datalink-Comms Isolated Fixture (Integration)

```bash
/replay-verify   # on baltic-patrol-datalink-comms
```

**What to test:**
- Comms transitions + datalink doctrine in one isolated replay
- Fixture excluded from ReplayGolden 6/6 catalog
- Production Baltic hash unchanged

**Estimated test count:** ~4–6

- [ ] Checks 14–16 re-confirmed from S32 baseline

2. `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln` — ≥1073 day-1; ≥1086 closeout

4. `CatalogWriteGate` regression on data merges
5. `rg TlBranchDatabase|BranchDatabase` → zero
6. Production Baltic world hash unchanged unless isolated fixture approved

## Playtest Requirements

*No playtest sessions required for this sprint.* Headless proxy remains merge authority for Unity stories (lean mode).

---

## Definition of Done — This Sprint

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — automated test OR documented manual evidence
- [ ] Logic/Integration stories have passing filtered `dotnet test` evidence
- [ ] Visual/UI stories have PNG evidence or lean PASS WITH NOTES
- [ ] Smoke check passes (`/smoke-check sprint`) before QA hand-off
- [ ] `/team-qa sprint` sign-off: APPROVED or APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS
- [ ] No S1 or S2 bugs in delivered features
- [ ] `DelegationBridge.cs` zero diff on every merge

---

Run `/team-qa sprint` after S33-13 closeout. Required artifacts:

- This QA plan
